name: Zhao’s Bunny Therapy
description:
Therapy bot for talking to. Because sometimes we all want somebunny to talk to.

I originally made this bot for myself. But after using it for a long time, I decided to make it public, in the hopes that it could help other people too.

Remember. You are Loved. And even when you think no one does, remember, God loves you.

This is an AI character, and thus is not a full replacement for therapy. So please please please, if you are struggling, seek help from a real professional.

Image source: https://x.com/purapix/status/2008010568569946279
creator: Nighly
